---
name: Bug Report
about: Report a bug in eApps
title: "[BUG] "
labels: bug
assignees: ""
---

## Description

A clear and concise description of the bug.

## Steps to Reproduce

1. Build with `cmake -B build -DEAPPS_PORT=sdl2 && cmake --build build`
2. Run `./build/eapps_suite`
3. ...
4. See error

## Expected Behavior

What you expected to happen.

## Actual Behavior

What actually happened. Include error messages or stack traces.

## Environment

- **OS:** (e.g., Ubuntu 22.04, Windows 11, macOS 14)
- **Compiler:** (e.g., GCC 13.2, Clang 17, MSVC 19.38)
- **CMake version:** (e.g., 3.28)
- **eApps version:** (e.g., 2.0.0)
- **Port:** (e.g., sdl2, eos, web)

## App (if applicable)

- **App name:** (e.g., ecal, snake, essh)
- **Category:** (e.g., productivity, games, connectivity)

## Additional Context

Any other context, logs, or screenshots.
